completed.title: Steal and drive cars
completed.description: Walk up to a car, tap CAR, and drive it through the city with a smooth chase camera, revving engine and tire screech — tap again to hop out.

completed.title: Street jobs for cash
completed.description: Talk to a contact to take a delivery job: race to the glowing pickup, then to the drop-off, and get paid. Take on as many runs as you want.

completed.title: Find and fire a pistol
completed.description: Grab the pistol on the street and shoot, with muzzle flash, bullet impacts, recoil kick, limited ammo and reloading.

completed.title: Police & a wanted level
completed.description: Causing trouble — gunfire or taking down a cop — raises your wanted stars and brings police chasing through the streets. Lose them to cool off, or get caught and busted for a chunk of cash.

completed.title: City minimap & districts
completed.description: A live minimap shows the streets around you, your job markers, chasing cops and the name of the district you're in.

next_features.title: Health, damage & getaways
next_features.description: Take damage from the cops and patch up, raising the stakes of every chase.

next_features.title: More weapons to find
next_features.description: Shotguns, rifles and melee weapons hidden around the city, each with its own feel.

next_features.title: Faster cars & damage
next_features.description: Distinct vehicles with different speed and handling, plus dents and crashes.

next_features.title: Spend your cash
next_features.description: Stores where you can buy weapons, ammo and upgrades with the money you earn.

next_features.title: Story missions with stakes
next_features.description: Hand-crafted jobs with bigger payouts, twists and rival crews.

phase_summary: Phase 2 complete — the crime gameplay loop is in: drive, take jobs, earn cash, draw heat
game_state: The Narrows is now a playable open-world crime game. You roam a large city on foot or behind the wheel of cars you can steal and drive. Contacts hand out paid delivery jobs you complete by driving to pickup and drop-off markers. You can find and fire a pistol with real ammo, recoil and impact effects. Trouble raises a wanted level that sends police chasing you across the grid, and getting caught busts you for cash. A live minimap with district names ties it all together, on top of fully customizable touch controls.

next_phase_prompt.headline: The crime loop is live
next_phase_prompt.body: Drive, deliver, earn, and outrun the cops. Where should the Narrows go next?
